title: Critical Materials Innovation Hub
description: The Critical Materials Innovation Hub is a U.S. Department of Energy (DOE) Energy Innovation Hub led by Ames National Laboratory that seeks to accelerate innovative scientific and technological solutions to develop resilient and secure supply chains for rare earth metals and other materials critical to the success of energy technologies.
text:
Ames National Laboratory produced this video "A scalable solution to an old recycling problem | R&D 100 Green Tech Recognition," where CMI focus area deputies Ikenna Nlebedim and Denis Prodius describe the process developed in a CMI project led by Prodius. This CMI technology won Gold in the Green Tech category of the 2025 R&D 100 Awards program.
See this video and the newest videos from CMI and its partners on YouTube HERE
